description: A guest complains that the sound at a concert is painfully loud in their section.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the complaint and get the guest's exact seat location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the complaint and location.

nodes.task_description: Contact the in-house audio engineer at the soundboard.

expected_outcome.value: Agent reaches the audio engineer via radio.

nodes.task_description: Relay the complaint and ask the engineer to check the sound levels in that specific section.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer checks the levels and makes a slight adjustment to the mix for that area.

nodes.task_description: Offer the guest complimentary earplugs from the guest services booth.

expected_outcome.value: Agent offers a solution to improve the guest's comfort.
